case_results.name: frontend_web_developer

request.query_text: frontend engineer focused on building interactive web applications

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have frontend or web development experience, JavaScript and CSS skills, and evidence of building user-facing web applications.

case_results.name: backend_software_engineer

request.query_text: backend engineer with Python and API development experience

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have backend or software engineering experience, Python and SQL skills, and evidence of API or service development.

case_results.name: data_analyst_reporting

request.query_text: data analyst who can analyze business data and build reports

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have data analysis experience, SQL skills, report-building or dashboard experience, and evidence of working with business or analytical datasets.

case_results.name: frontend_react_typescript

request.query_text: frontend developer with React and TypeScript for modern web applications

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have frontend development experience, React and TypeScript skills, and evidence of building modern user-facing web applications.

case_results.name: data_engineer_etl

request.query_text: data engineer for ETL pipelines and analytics platforms

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have data engineering experience, Spark, ETL, and SQL skills, and evidence of building or operating data pipelines.

case_results.name: machine_learning_engineer

request.query_text: machine learning engineer with Python and model development experience

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have machine learning engineering experience, Python skills, and evidence of model development or applied ML delivery.

case_results.name: secretary_office_operations

request.query_text: secretary who can coordinate office tasks and support daily administration

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have secretary or office support experience, strong office software skills, and evidence of handling day-to-day administrative coordination.

case_results.name: bank_manager_financial_analysis

request.query_text: bank manager with financial analysis and banking operations experience

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have bank management or banking leadership experience, financial analysis and forecasting skills, and evidence of overseeing banking operations or client portfolios.

case_results.name: business_analyst_database_statistics

request.query_text: business analyst with database and statistics skills for process improvement

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have business analysis experience, database and statistics skills, and evidence of translating business needs into analytical or process improvements.

case_results.name: accountant_financial_reporting

request.query_text: accountant with accounting and financial statement reporting experience

case_results.expected_output: Relevant candidates should have accounting experience, accounting and financial statement skills, and evidence of reporting, reconciliation, or financial close work.
